case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. THEO HONNIBALL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 74106992) TO PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-18-2024 CONTINUED TO FEB-19-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HONNIBALL, THEO $18,947.02 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $18,947.02, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 75423973)
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 75423973) AS TO DEFENDANT HONNIBALL, THEO
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-19-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
